<!--
Thanks for contributing to ACKS God Mode! Fill in the sections below and tick the
boxes. The full branch / commit / release policy is in CONTRIBUTING.md — please
skim it before opening a PR if you haven't already.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two sentences is fine for a small fix. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (`refactor:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] **I assign copyright of this contribution to Joachim Buchert.**
      <!-- Required for every external PR — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Without this line
           the PR can't be merged. (For substantial contributions we may discuss a
           more formal agreement; mention it here if so.) -->
- [ ] The tests pass locally (`npm test` — 0 failures).
- [ ] I added a `## [Unreleased]` entry in `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible change (Added / Changed / Fixed / Removed / Security).
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type: short description`).
- [ ] This branch is off `main` (not `release`), and I'm not self-merging — the maintainer reviews and merges.

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs judgment, screenshots for a UI change, a `.acks.json` that
exercises the change, follow-ups you're aware of, etc. Optional. -->
